method: Evidence-weighted qualitative comparison without a synthetic numeric score.

pilot-das-zimmer.title: Das Zimmer
pilot-das-zimmer.premiseEvidence: Ricco arrives in a Berlin house whose progressive language repeatedly hides rent, control and everyday power games.
pilot-das-zimmer.comedyEngine: Strong fish-out-of-water engine plus recurring contradiction between declared solidarity and practiced control.

productionProfile.mainRisk: Visual masters, location masters and approved voices are still missing.

pilot-der-solidarpreis.title: Der Solidarpreis
pilot-der-solidarpreis.premiseEvidence: Only the six-panel shape and named cast are currently recoverable from repository evidence.

productionProfile.visibleCharacterScope: probably smaller than Das Zimmer, but not safely specifiable
productionProfile.mainRisk: The original planning source is not versioned and implementation from memory is forbidden.

basis: It is the only candidate with a versioned panel blueprint and timing package.
The house, ensemble and recurring power dynamics form a clearer repeatable series engine.
Its larger asset scope is visible and planable, while Der Solidarpreis still has an unknown source gap.
It already fits the intended 9:16 short-form format without requiring story reconstruction.
advisoryRecommendation.boundary: This recommendation does not change selectedCandidateId and cannot authorize canon.

allowedHumanResults: restore the original source and then select pilot-der-solidarpreis
reject both and deliberately author a third pilot
